case_title: ZIJIAN WANG VS. BRADLEY TATUM H. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED TO COURT BY DEFENDANT'S AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,018.00 FILED BY WANG, ZIJIAN AS TO DEFENDANT TATUM, BRADLEY H. ENTERPRISE-RENT-A-CAR COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TATUM, BRADLEY H.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTERPRISE-RENT-A-CAR COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-25-2008 AT 1:30PM.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ZIJIAN
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF DEFENDANT AND REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ZIJIAN
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-25-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-17-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, ZIJIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TATUM, BRADLEY H. $3,018.00 PRINCIPAL, $167.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,185.50, DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE-RENT-A-CAR DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
